name: Bluberry Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Add milk and whisk until smooth.
3. Lightly spray a casserole dish with cooking spray.
4. Pour batter into the prepared dish.
5. Sprinkle blueberries on top.
6. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 40 minutes or until lightly browned.
